name: Caramelized Onions in Flaky Pastry
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the breadcrumbs in 4 Tbsp of butter until golden and toasted.
2. Cook onions in a steamer over simmering water until crisp and tender.
3. Saute onions in 6 Tbsp butter for about 10 minutes, turning to coat all sides.
4. Pour in wine and beef broth; add fresh ground pepper. Continue cooking.
5. Place onion mixture into a partially baked crust; sprinkle with additional topping.
6. Bake at 20 minutes; let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
1. Process flour, salt, butter, and shortening until the dough forms a ball.
2. Add 2 Tbsp water and process until fully incorporated.
3. Remove dough from processor; shape into a flattened disc.
4. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Roll out dough to fit a 10-inch quiche or tart pan.
6. Line chilled pastry with a large sheet of aluminum foil and fill as directed.
